title: jatropha urens var. neglecta
intro: Jatropha urens var. neglecta is a variety of the Jatropha urens plant, which is a shrub or small tree native to tropical regions of the world. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The plant is said to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions like eczema and acne, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Jatropha urens var. neglecta include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used topically or taken orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
